column8: I wish I___________(have) a million euros! I'd buy lots of great things.
column9: I wish we__________(live) in a bigger house. This one is too small.
column10: Becca wishes she_____________(be) old enough to drive a car.
column11: Do you wish you__________(feel) more confident about the exam tomorrow.
column12: I wish my computer____________(not/be) broken. I can't check my e-mail.
column13: I wish I_____________(not/like) chocolate so much! I eat three bars a day!
column14: Grant wishes he_______________(not/make) so many mistakes all the time.
column15: Look what they're wearing! I bet they wish they____________(not/look) so silly!
